subcodes.first_line: Thou hast been repeatedly remembered in the presence of the Wronged One, and in each instance hast thou attained unto the remembrance of God. This mention is among the bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت مکرر لدی المظلوم مذکور و در هر کره بذکر حق فائز شدی این ذکر از نعمتهای
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @wisdom [hikmat]
